units.content: Jiang et al. (arXiv:2510.22954) measures inter-model output homogeneity across 70+ LLMs
NeurIPS 2025 Datasets & Benchmarks track awarded this work Best Paper, marking it the highest-profile 2025 work on inter-model output homogeneity
Omission of this reference post-September-2025 would be conspicuous, making disclosure mandatory
Specification §4.14 distinguishes this reference as covering observational homogeneity measurement, whereas claim 8a is a per-property divergence-location predictor
